title: 34-Inch Large Foil Helium Number Balloons – Multi-Colored Party Decoration (0-9) (Black, Number 1)
features: ✨ Large 34-Inch Size for Maximum Impact: Make your celebrations unforgettable with these jumbo-sized foil number balloons, perfect for photo backdrops and party decorations.
🎨 Multiple Stunning Colors Available: Choose from black, green, dark blue, gold, pink, rose gold, rainbow, and silver to match any party theme or décor.
🔢 Numbers 0-9 to Create Any Combination: These balloons are available in digits 0-9, allowing you to mix and match to display any age, anniversary, or milestone year.
💨 Easy Inflation with Helium or Air: Designed for convenience, these balloons can be quickly inflated using helium for a floating effect or air for easy wall and backdrop decoration.
🎉 Perfect for Every Celebration: Ideal for birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, graduations, and other special events. A great choice for people with latex allergies as they are completely latex-free.
description: Celebrate every special occasion in style with our 34-Inch Large Foil Helium Number Balloons, designed to make your events truly unforgettable! These premium-quality balloons are available in numbers 0-9, allowing you to create any combination to perfectly represent birthdays, anniversaries, graduation years, milestones, and more. Crafted from high-grade refined aluminium foil, these balloons are durable, leak-proof, and safe, ensuring they stay inflated for a longer period without bursting easily. Unlike traditional latex balloons, these foil balloons are latex-free, making them the ideal choice for individuals with latex allergies. Available in eight stunning colors – black, green, dark blue, gold, pink, rose gold, rainbow, and silver – these balloons add a vibrant, festive touch to any party décor. Whether you’re planning a chic wedding, a fun birthday bash, or an elegant anniversary celebration, you can match these balloons to your event theme effortlessly.
